headlines.title: As Meta lays off 10%, 7,000 employees will be moved into AI roles, source says
headlines.description: Meta is moving 7,000 employees into roles focused on AI and consolidating them into four new organizations, according to a source familiar with the matter.

headlines.title: Jury throws out Elon Musk’s lawsuit against OpenAI and Sam Altman in less than two hours
headlines.description: The jury ruled that Elon Musk had waited too long to sue OpenAI and its other co-founders.

headlines.title: Prediction market ‘watchdog’ launches six-figure ad campaign ahead of Senate hearing
headlines.description: A group that says its mission is to serve as a prediction market “watchdog” is launching a six-figure ad buy this week in the Washington, D.C., media market.

headlines.title: Six tech billionaires walked into a federal courthouse. Here’s what happened next.
headlines.description: The three-week OpenAI trial had numerous markings of its subjects’ wealth, from an inflatable Elon Musk doll to fancy butt cushions.

headlines.title: Inside China’s race to dominate humanoid robotics industry
headlines.description: Beijing has put the robotics industry front and center of its national agenda as the tech race with Washington heats up in several key areas, including AI.

headlines.title: DOJ indicts Raúl Castro over fatal 1996 civilian planes’ shooting
headlines.description: The Justice Department indicted former Cuban president Raúl Castro on Wednesday in connection to the 1996 shooting of two civilian planes that killed four Cuban Americans.

headlines.title: Health Officials Race to Trace Rising Ebola Cases in Central Africa
headlines.description: The American doctor who tested positive for Ebola while working in Congo has been evacuated to Berlin to receive emergency care. Health officials are racing to trace infections in Central Africa and worry the scale of the outbreak is already larger than first reported. NBC’s Molly Hunter reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: After 5 decades and 600 executions, these are the last words on Texas’ death row
headlines.description: An NBC News analysis of final statements from prisoners on Texas’ death row shows that some convey a readiness to die. Others are defiant. Many seek salvation.

headlines.title: Chaos consumes Swatch stores over pocket watch collaboration with Audemars Piguet
headlines.description: Swatch shut down over a dozen stores after crowds swarmed some locations trying to buy the company’s new pocket watch collection with Audemars Piguet, that are already listed for thousands on re-sale sites. NBC News’ Marquise Francis reports.

headlines.title: First look at new Trump Mobile smartphone
headlines.description: After a nine-month wait, repeated calls and emails, NBC News finally received the long-delayed Trump Mobile T1 phone - raising new questions about where it’s actually made. NBC News’ Brian Cheung reports.

headlines.title: Philadelphia high school fights misinformation crisis
headlines.description: A principal and nine students at Philadelphia's Kensington Health Sciences Academy have launched Project FACTS to help others learn how to think for themselves and question the legitimacy of the information they see online.

headlines.title: Multiple commencement speakers booed for AI comments during graduation speeches
headlines.description: Former Google CEO Eric Schmidt was booed multiple times Sunday while discussing artificial intelligence during a commencement speech at the University of Arizona. Other commencement speakers faced similar backlash for their AI comments, as new graduates face a daunting job market. NBC News’ Valerie Castro reports.
